Vatic Pro

Vatic Pro Saga

Modern all-court option with low entry price and broad level fit.

A budget-conscious all-court comparison paddle for players who want balance rather than a pure control or pure power build.

TypeAll-court
Shapehybrid
Core10mm celled polypropylene honeycomb
FaceComposite carbon surface
Reference price$99.99
Price noteOfficial Vatic Pro all-paddles listing
Level3.0, 3.5, 4.0, 4.5
TraitsBalance, Spin, Stability, Value
Used by / lineVatic Pro users / value hunters
Official product page

Prices, sponsors, rankings, DUPR, and product availability change. Verify on the linked official source before publishing buying advice.

Prices, specs, and approved-equipment status can change. Treat this as a research dashboard and verify official retailer and equipment-list pages before purchase.

Play profile

Power7.7
Control8.3
Spin8.3
Forgiveness8.0
Hand speed8.1

Scores are editorial comparison notes based on product positioning and common review signals; they are not lab measurements.

How the Saga plays

The Vatic Pro Saga is a balanced all-court paddle. On our 0–10 comparison scale its strongest traits are control and spin. Its hybrid shape balances reach with a usable sweet spot.

It is aimed at 3.0–4.5 players, and it is forgiving enough for improvers still grooving their swing. It favours touch over raw put-away power. It sits in the mid price tier — confirm the current price at the source before buying. It is part of the Vatic Pro users / value hunters.
